_comment: Re-derived R3 baseline floor for lead avg_ctx_tok, replacing the stale pre-adoption scalar 159707. This is the work-intensity-guarded MEDIAN of the pre-DCP (2026-05-17 -> 2026-06-15) lead per-day avg_ctx_tok series (9 of 30 days kept inside the +/-50% band of the trailing-90-day lead-turns/day median of 813). source_commit is the DCP-introduction commit (2026-06-16). Ratchet invariant: floor moves DOWN ONLY, and only on a guard-passing lower median that has been human-ratified. The current post-DCP segment (~6 days) is too young to ratchet (revisit at >=30 post-DCP days); /audit displays a candidate floor every run but does NOT auto-commit it. git history of this file is the ratchet audit trail.
